episode.title: The Ancient Ritual of Calling Shotgun

beats.narration: In the early days of automotive transportation, a ritual emerged to determine who would occupy the coveted front passenger seat.
beats.direction: Aerial shot of a vintage car driving down a scenic road.
beats.footage_prompt: Vintage car driving on a winding mountain road at sunset

grade.note: Enhance the warm tones of the vintage car and the natural scenery.

beats.narration: This ancient custom, known as 'calling shotgun,' was a complex social dance of politeness and one-upmanship.
beats.direction: Close-up shot of two people arguing over the front seat.
beats.footage_prompt: Two people in a vintage car arguing with each other

grade.note: Enhance the dry humor in this scene by applying a cool, neutral color grade.

beats.narration: As time passed, the ritual evolved to include subtle cues and unspoken rules.
beats.direction: Aerial shot of a car driving down a highway with people waving from other cars.
beats.footage_prompt: Vintage car driving on a highway with people waving at each other

grade.note: Enhance the high-contrast colors of the highway and the waving people.

beats.narration: Today, calling shotgun remains a ubiquitous practice, with its own set of unwritten rules and social norms.
beats.direction: Close-up shot of a person proudly claiming the front seat.
beats.footage_prompt: Person proudly sitting in the front passenger seat

grade.note: Enhance the cool, vignette-style color grade to convey a sense of pride and accomplishment.

beats.narration: But as we continue to evolve as a society, perhaps it's time to reexamine this ancient ritual and its place in our modern world.
beats.direction: Aerial shot of a car driving away from the camera with a cityscape in the background.
beats.footage_prompt: Vintage car driving away from the camera with a city skyline in the background

grade.note: Apply a desaturated color grade to convey a sense of reflection and contemplation.

beats.narration: Join us next time as we explore more fascinating aspects of human culture.
beats.direction: Closing shot of the narrator in front of a vintage car.
beats.footage_prompt: Narrator standing in front of a vintage car

grade.note: Enhance the bright, vivid colors of the closing shot to leave a lasting impression on the viewer.

titlecard.text: The Ancient Ritual of Calling Shotgun
